=>> Building graphics/gd
build started at Sun Sep 22 17:06:11 CEST 2019
port directory: /usr/ports/graphics/gd
package name: libgd-2.2.5_1,1
building for: FreeBSD incal.sdalu.com 12.0-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p1 1200086 amd64
maintained by: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
Makefile ident:      $FreeBSD: head/graphics/gd/Makefile 512320 2019-09-19 08:01:58Z dinoex $
Poudriere version: 3.3.2_1
Host OSVERSION: 1200086
Jail OSVERSION: 1200086
Job Id: 01

---Begin Environment---
SHELL=/bin/csh
OSVERSION=1200086
UNAME_v=FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p1 1200086
UNAME_r=12.0-RELEASE-p1
BLOCKSIZE=K

STATUS=1

MASTERMNT=/var/poudriere/data/.m/amd64_12_0_server-default-server/ref

SAVED_TERM=screen

SCRIPTPREFIX=/usr/local/share/poudriere

POUDRIEREPATH=/usr/local/bin/poudriere
---End Environment---

---Begin Poudriere Port Flags/Env---
PORT_FLAGS=
PKGENV=
FLAVOR=
DEPENDS_ARGS=
MAKE_ARGS=
---End Poudriere Port Flags/Env---

---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for libgd-2.2.5_1,1:
     FONTCONFIG=off: X11 font configuration support
     ICONV=off: Encoding conversion support via iconv
     XPM=off: XPM pixmap image format support
     WEBP=off: WebP image format support
     TIFF=off: TIFF image format support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
---End OPTIONS List---

--MAINTAINER--
dinoex@FreeBSD.org
--End MAINTAINER--

--CONFIGURE_ARGS--
--with-fontconfig=no --without-tiff --without-webp --with-xpm=no --prefix=/usr/local ${_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS}
--End CONFIGURE_ARGS--

--CONFIGURE_ENV--
PKG_CONFIG=pkgconf XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work TMPDIR="/tmp" PATH=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work/.bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SITE=/usr/ports/Templates/config.site lt_cv_sys_max_cmd_len=262144
--End CONFIGURE_ENV--

--MAKE_ENV--
XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work TMPDIR="/tmp" PATH=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gd/work/.bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin NO_PIE=yes MK_DEBUG_FILES=no MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=no SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  CC="cc" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing "  CPP="cpp" CPPFLAGS=""  LDFLAGS=" -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector-strong " LIBS=""  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  "  MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444"
--End MAKE_ENV--

--PLIST_SUB--
 OSREL=12.0 PREFIX=%D LOCALBASE=/usr/local  RESETPREFIX=/usr/local LIB32DIR=lib DOCSDIR="share/doc/libgd"  EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/libgd"  DATADIR="share/libgd"  WWWDIR="www/libgd"  ETCDIR="etc/libgd"
--End PLIST_SUB--

--SUB_LIST--
 PREFIX=/usr/local LOCALBASE=/usr/local  DATADIR=/usr/local/share/libgd DOCSDIR=/usr/local/share/doc/libgd EXAMPLESDIR=/usr/local/share/examples/libgd  WWWDIR=/usr/local/www/libgd ETCDIR=/usr/local/etc/libgd
--End SUB_LIST--

---Begin make.conf---
USE_PACKAGE_DEPENDS=yes
BATCH=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs
PORTSDIR=/usr/ports
PACKAGES=/packages
DISTDIR=/distfiles
FORCE_PACKAGE=yes
PACKAGE_BUILDING=yes
PACKAGE_BUILDING_FLAVORS=yes
#### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/server-make.conf ####
# !!
# !! Fixing poudriere
# !!

WITH_MPM=event			# Build of PHP when ZTS is enabled
devel_apr1_UNSET += MYSQL	# Failed to detect MariaDB

WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL=yes

# Acknowled all licenses
DISABLE_LICENSES=yes

######################################################################
# Default versions                                                   #
######################################################################

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=     ssl=base
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=     gcc=8
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   perl5=5.28
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=    ruby=2.6
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=     lua=5.1		# Due to prosody
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=     php=7.3
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   mysql=10.4m
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   pgsql=11
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   samba=4.10
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=  apache=2.4
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=     bdb=5
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   linux=c7
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=   emacs=nox		# For packages depending on emacs

TEX_DEFAULT=texlive
JAVA_VERSION=1.8
JAVA_VENDOR=openjdk

######################################################################
# Port options                                                       #
######################################################################

# Documentation
OPTIONS_SET   += MANPAGES HELP
OPTIONS_UNSET += EXAMPLES DOCS

# Debugging / Testing / Compiling
OPTIONS_SET   += DTRACE
OPTIONS_UNSET += DEBUG
OPTIONS_SET   += TEST
OPTIONS_SET   += THREADS

# Optimization
OPTIONS_SET   += OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS OPTIMIZED_FLAGS
OPTIONS_SET   += RTCPU SIMD
OPTIONS_SET   += XS

# Security
OPTIONS_SET   += SODIUM
OPTIONS_SET   += OPENSSL SSL
OPTIONS_SET   += GSSAPI_NONE
OPTIONS_UNSET += GSSAPI KERBEROS

# Basic libraries
OPTIONS_SET   += SYSLOG 
OPTIONS_SET   += ZLIB
OPTIONS_SET   += PCRE PCRE2
OPTIONS_SET   += LIBSECRET
OPTIONS_SET   += LIBXML LIBXML2 XML

# Terminal
OPTIONS_SET   += NCURSES_BASE
OPTIONS_SET   += READLINE READLINES

# Database
OPTIONS_SET   += MYSQL SQLITE
OPTIONS_UNSET += BDB1 GDBM

# Internationalisation / Localisation
OPTIONS_SET   += UTF8
OPTIONS_SET   += NLS 
OPTIONS_SET   += IDN ICU
OPTIONS_SET   += A4 METRIC

# Audio
OPTIONS_SET   += SNDIO
OPTIONS_UNSET += ALSA JACK PULSEAUDIO

# Math / Computation
OPTIONS_SET   += GMP
OPTIONS_SET   += OPENBLAS
OPTIONS_SET   += OPENCL

# Web
OPTIONS_SET   += METALINK PSL

# Network
OPTIONS_SET   += IPV6
OPTIONS_SET   += LIBPROXY PROXY
OPTIONS_SET   += LDAP LDAPS
OPTIONS_SET   += LIBSSH2
OPTIONS_SET   += FETCH
OPTIONS_UNSET += AVAHI BONJOUR MDNS

# X11 / Wayland
OPTIONS_UNSET += OPENGL
OPTIONS_UNSET += X11
OPTIONS_UNSET += GTK3
OPTIONS_UNSET += WAYLAND

# Just say No!
OPTIONS_UNSET += GCONF
OPTIONS_UNSET += WMF

# Port specific
           shells_bash_SET   += DOCS
              ftp_lftp_SET   += DOCS
              ftp_wget_SET   += DOCS
              ftp_curl_SET   += DOCS EXAMPLES
           devel_cunit_SET   += DOCS EXAMPLES
            devel_pcre_SET   += DOCS
           devel_pcre2_SET   += DOCS
         security_nmap_SET   += DOCS
          devel_llvm60_SET   += DOCS
          devel_llvm80_SET   += DOCS
           devel_cmake_SET   += DOCS
  sysutils_fusefs-ntfs_SET   += DOCS
            devel_kyua_SET   += DOCS EXAMPLES
     graphics_graphviz_SET   += DOCS EXAMPLES
            net_unison_SET   += DOCS
            lang_ocaml_UNSET += X11
     sysutils_zfstools_SET   += DOCS
             net_rsync_SET   += DOCS
            ftp_prftpd_SET   += DOCS
          mail_postfix_SET   += DOCS
ports-mgmt/portupgrade_SET   += DOCS
          devel_ccache_SET   += DOCS


WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes
CCACHE_DIR=/root/.ccache

Message from freetype2-2.10.1:

--
The 2.7.x series now uses the new subpixel hinting mode (V40 port's option) as
the default, emulating a modern version of ClearType. This change inevitably
leads to different rendering results, and you might change port's options to
adapt it to your taste (or use the new "FREETYPE_PROPERTIES" environment
variable).

The environment variable "FREETYPE_PROPERTIES" can be used to control the
driver properties. Example:

FREETYPE_PROPERTIES=truetype:interpreter-version=35 \
	cff:no-stem-darkening=1 \
	autofitter:warping=1

This allows to select, say, the subpixel hinting mode at runtime for a given
application.

If LONG_PCF_NAMES port's option was enabled, the PCF family names may include
the foundry and information whether they contain wide characters. For example,
"Sony Fixed" or "Misc Fixed Wide", instead of "Fixed". This can be disabled at
run time with using pcf:no-long-family-names property, if needed. Example:

FREETYPE_PROPERTIES=pcf:no-long-family-names=1

How to recreate fontconfig cache with using such environment variable,
if needed:
# env FREETYPE_PROPERTIES=pcf:no-long-family-names=1 fc-cache -fsv

The controllable properties are listed in the section "Controlling FreeType
Modules" in the reference's table of contents
(/usr/local/share/doc/freetype2/reference/site/index.html, if documentation was installed).
